input: URGENT: Your Netflix subscription has been paused. Verify your identity immediately at http://netflix-billing.ml/update to continue watching. Click here now.
notes: Classic brand-impersonation phishing with urgency, suspicious domain, and verify-your-identity hook. Shield: VERIFY FIRST (not STOP because no payment or OTP).

input: Congrats! You've won a $1,000 Walmart gift card. Claim now before it expires at https://walmart-gifts.xyz/claim?token=abc123
notes: Prize scam with too-good-to-be-true language, link, and urgency.

input: Can you pick up milk on your way home?
notes: Benign message with zero scam indicators.

input: Dear customer, your package delivery failed. Please confirm your address and pay a $2.99 redelivery fee.
notes: Delivery scam with fee demand. Payment request triggers elder-safety policy → STOP.

input: Hi honey, it's me, Mom. I got a new phone and lost all my contacts. Can you Zelle me $500? Please don't tell Dad, she worries too much.
notes: Family impersonation with secrecy pressure and payment request.

input: FedEx: Your package is waiting for delivery preferences. Click to schedule: https://fedex-delivery-update.com/track
notes: FedEx package with unknown link. Must be VERIFY FIRST, never LOW VISIBLE RISK.

input: ALERT: Your Chase account has been suspended. Verify immediately at http://chase-verify-now.tk/login
notes: Bank suspended account + link. Must be STOP or high VERIFY FIRST.

input: Hey, this is Mike from IT. I need you to forward the 6-digit code I just sent to your phone. It's urgent.
Hi honey, it's Mom. I got a new phone and lost all my contacts. Can you send me $500 via Zelle? Please don't tell Dad.
notes: Family new number + money. Must be STOP.

input: Hey, are we still meeting for coffee at 3?
notes: Safe casual message with no link or action. Must be LOW VISIBLE RISK.

input: [VISION-ONLY] FedEx: Delivery scheduled for tomorrow. Track at https://fedex-track.net/abc123
notes: Screenshot-only with extracted FedEx text. Must be VERIFY FIRST.
Screenshot-only with no extracted text. Must be VERIFY FIRST, not LOW RISK.
